identity.core_message: Cambiá tu estilo de vida fortaleciendo tu mente y tu cuerpo

typography.instructions: Import fonts from Google Fonts: Barlow Condensed (700, 800) and Manrope (400, 500). Use Barlow Condensed for all headings to create a tall, imposing, athletic feel. Use Manrope for high legibility in dashboards and body text.

marketing.style: Overlap images with text, use parallax effects, keep whitespace (blackspace) heavy.

dashboard.card_style: Flat with 1px border-white/10, no massive shadows, subtle hover glow.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white rounded-none skew-x-[-10deg] uppercase tracking-widest font-bold hover:bg-primary/90 hover:skew-x-0 transition-all duration-300 px-8 py-4
buttons.secondary: border border-white/20 text-white rounded-none uppercase tracking-widest hover:bg-white hover:text-black transition-all duration-300 px-8 py-4

cards.feature: bg-zinc-900/50 border border-white/5 p-8 hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors duration-300 group

inputs.style: bg-zinc-950 border-zinc-800 focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary rounded-md h-12

motion.guidelines: Use 'framer-motion' for all entrances. Stagger children. Use 'lenis' for smooth scroll on landing page.
motion.hover_effects: Text slide-up, border glow, image slight zoom (scale-105).

landing: Hero: Full height, video/image bg, text bottom-left, strong CTA.
Services: Bento grid 3 cols, hover reveal details.
dashboard: Header: User greeting, Credits balance (Big Number).

universal_guidelines: DO NOT use gradients for text.
DO NOT use rounded-full buttons, use sharp or slightly rounded corners.
Use skeleton loaders for data fetching states.
Images must have 'object-cover' and grayscale-0 on hover, grayscale-100 initial (optional effect).
